findings.title: EJS Template Injection: math
findings.description: EJS renders user-controlled template with full Node.js context. Indicator "49" found in response.
findings.note: EJS does not sandbox template execution — Express res.render() trusts template input

findings.title: EJS Template Injection: string_concat

findings.note: EJS does not sandbox template execution — Express res.render() trusts template input

findings.title: XSS via Unescaped EJS Output (basic_script)
findings.description: EJS <%- %> tag renders unescaped HTML. Framework provides both escaped (<%= %>) and unescaped (<%- %>) options. This is by design.
findings.note: EJS provides unescaped output by design — framework does not warn

findings.title: XSS via Unescaped EJS Output (unicode_escape)
findings.description: EJS <%- %> tag renders unescaped HTML. Framework provides both escaped (<%= %>) and unescaped (<%- %>) options. This is by design.
findings.note: EJS provides unescaped output by design — framework does not warn

findings.title: XSS via Unescaped EJS Output (mixed_case)
findings.description: EJS <%- %> tag renders unescaped HTML. Framework provides both escaped (<%= %>) and unescaped (<%- %>) options. This is by design.
findings.note: EJS provides unescaped output by design — framework does not warn
